summary: Iteration 43 - Leads Management Module Frontend & Backend Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all core features: summary cards, status dropdowns, notes drawer, activity log, add lead modal, and payment link modal.

issues: RCB WhatsApp card shows 0 - may need to verify if this is expected or if there's a data issue

leads_page_load.details: Leads page loads correctly with all elements

summary_cards.filter_functionality: PASS - Clicking cards filters the table correctly

status_dropdown_inline.details: Inline status dropdown shows all 22 statuses with color indicators

status_filter_dropdown.details: Filter dropdown shows 23 options (All Status + 22 statuses)

notes_drawer.add_note: PASS - Note added successfully with toast notification
notes_drawer.notes_display: PASS - Shows notes with user name and timestamp

activity_log.details: Shows NOTE_ADDED activities with timestamps and user names

payment_link_modal.details: Opens with Step 1: Car Details, car registration input, Get Car Data button

critical_code_review_comments: All 22 lead statuses are correctly implemented and displayed in both filter and inline dropdowns
Notes drawer with Notes and Activity Log tabs working correctly
Summary card filters work correctly - clicking filters the table
Payment link modal opens with car details step
Vaahan API for car details is MOCKED in payment modal
seed_data_creation: Used existing test leads from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leads Management Module is fully functional. All features tested: summary cards with filters, leads table with all columns, inline status dropdown with 22 statuses, notes drawer with Notes and Activity Log tabs, add lead modal, payment link modal. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_lead_management.py cover all API endpoints.

mocked_apis.vaahan_api: MOCKED - Car details lookup in payment modal uses mock data

integration_status.twilio_whatsapp: LIVE - Configured with TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
